{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201207200433AA36C4105491EB10"}"},"total":39},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616731565008274238","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很棒啊，民俗故事也挺合理、怪诞的，没有莫名其妙的女主，官方也非常棒，懂合作～(￣▽￣～)~期待后续，催更催更[害羞][害羞][害羞][害羞][害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773410951,"group_id":"7608015430359206974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世界灿烂盛大，欢迎回家。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8evh+nfqvM9TwEST0E24yt2gdbP7ca+SyHcVQ288BDG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a575ec1c8c2e4b6a9ade08ddef4b353f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536890&x-signature=isdJAZvg0UZ8d0LhDSk6IHZ2XpA%3D","user_id":"2898784554068702","user_name":"好运逸连接"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2898784554068702","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608015430359206974","book_info":{"abstract":"这里是蓝星，一个科技高度发达，却遭遇了严重文化断层的世界。
这里没有春节，不知清明。
这里没有神话，不敬鬼神。
直到江宁穿越而来，绑定【民俗传说具现系统】。

在这个信仰荒芜的钢铁丛林里，他划燃了第一根火柴。

从《午夜敲门》的都市怪谈，到《十殿阎罗》的阴司秩序；
从《湘西赶尸》的诡秘行当，到《三坛海会大神》的法相降临。

起初，人们以为这只是一场哗众取宠的直播。
直到那晚，百鬼夜行，霓虹熄灭。
直到那晚，有人亲眼看见黑白无常勾魂索命，城隍金身镇压一方。

江宁坐在镜头前，身后是漫天神佛与无尽妖魔。
他微微一笑，对全人类说道：
“别怕，这只是……民俗科普。”

——
“只要还有人记得，神明便不会死去。”
“而我，是这旧时代的最后一位说书人，也是新纪元的唯一守夜人。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9a0be45398e56efcc78812ada29764c0","author":"太白煞星","author_id":"","book_id":"7608015430359206974","book_name":"民俗科普：我复苏了华夏神话","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7608016823845405246","read_count":"39288","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"273685"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"110","tags":"悬疑灵异,直播,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/578963f0dc5961c632761ac9a8d6b96b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779163640&x-signature=VF2zhB0Gvtu%2F%2FQBiMWlXKAyJ8gI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1337480323016875","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201207200433AA36C4105491EB10"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":392,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9070,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1551},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617042643833226008","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情不错，基本上没有什么狗血剧情的发生，虽然也有一些瑕疵（一些细节经不起推敲，不过看文嘛，丢掉脑子就好啦！）但是无伤大雅，很期待后续的发展，许愿一个无女主
看了眼评论区的其他评论，怎么说呢……实在不行你往后看看剧情再说呢？

目前来看是这样的（涉及剧透，讨厌剧透请直接划走，谢谢配合）：
原来的地府和天庭这类传说啥的在很早很早之前是存在的，后来不知道为什么就断层了（还没到那部分剧情），也就是说原本的东西还在但是等到发现那些东西的时候人们已经不知道这是干啥的了，也就是最开始的“唯物”
然后主角来到了这个世界，才掀开了这层空白，然后再人们的认知中进行填补

很好奇后续的发展和那段断层历史的空白，文里的小故事也很不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773484879,"group_id":"7608015430359206974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"什么都别说了，刀剑乱舞，启动！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+gt554qTmojBYtjRdITAfUQXGaLEwwoIjOJgkhzV96n","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/840ea3e808574d5a886f03d4e7075a01~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532274&x-signature=8T3rM%2BA%2FYE%2FfsZ86o9vLSVDCz%2B0%3D","user_id":"4116164888772456","user_name":"长明长明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4116164888772456","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608015430359206974","book_info":{"abstract":"这里是蓝星，一个科技高度发达，却遭遇了严重文化断层的世界。

从《湘西赶尸》的诡秘行当，到《三坛海会大神》的法相降临。

起初，人们以为这只是一场哗众取宠的直播。
直到那晚，百鬼夜行，霓虹熄灭。
直到那晚，有人亲眼看见黑白无常勾魂索命，城隍金身镇压一方。

江宁坐在镜头前，身后是漫天神佛与无尽妖魔。
他微微一笑，对全人类说道：
“别怕，这只是……民俗科普。”
